subject: A dark winged drake swooping forward through a swampy forest, wings spread, body angled aggressively toward the viewer
description: A lean, dark-scaled drake glides low through a fetid swamp, its broad wings spread wide and its body twisted in a downward swoop toward the viewer. Pale moonlight or a sickly daylight filters through bare, slimy tree trunks rising from still green-brown water. The drake's silhouette is mostly shadow with hints of greenish underlighting on its wing membranes. The whole scene is dim, washed in muted greens, ochres, and near-black, with the drake reading as a sharp predatory shape against the murk.
background: swampy wetland with bare slimy trees, still water, hazy atmosphere
